response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: N/A; Reference JSON correctly identified this as an MC segment with no vocal music. 2. JSON Usage: Manual transcription and translation utilized for the entire spoken dialogue and audience chanting. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are tightly anchored to vocal bursts, including audience chants, and partitioned logically to maintain semantic flow during the safety rules announcement.

subtitles.original: KIARA! INA! KIARA! INA! KIARA! INA!
subtitles.english: KIARA! INA! KIARA! INA! KIARA! INA!

subtitles.original: Thank you all so much for coming to...
subtitles.english: Thank you all so much for coming to...

subtitles.original:
Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's
first concert, "Drawn to Dawn"!
subtitles.english:
Takanashi Kiara and Ninomae Ina'nis's
first concert, "Drawn to Dawn"!

subtitles.original: Thank you, thank you!
subtitles.english: Thank you, thank you!

subtitles.original: KIKKERIKII!
subtitles.english: KIKKERIKII!

subtitles.original: Yay! I am Takanashi Kiara, and...
subtitles.english: Yay! I am Takanashi Kiara, and...

subtitles.original:
Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!
As you know, I'm Ninomae Ina'nis!
subtitles.english:
Good morning, afternoon, evening everyone!
As you know, I'm Ninomae Ina'nis!

subtitles.original: That's right, it's finally time for our concert!
subtitles.english: That's right, it's finally time for our concert!

subtitles.original: Is everyone hyped?
subtitles.english: Is everyone hyped?

subtitles.original:
Before we kick things off, we have some important
safety rules and house guidelines to go over.
subtitles.english:
Before we kick things off, we have some important
safety rules and house guidelines to go over.

subtitles.original:
First, photography and the use of any recording
equipment are strictly prohibited during the show.
subtitles.english:
First, photography and the use of any recording
equipment are strictly prohibited during the show.

subtitles.original:
Also, the venue is smoke-free,
so please refrain from smoking inside.
subtitles.english:
Also, the venue is smoke-free,
so please refrain from smoking inside.

subtitles.original: But what if I'm smoking hot?
subtitles.english: But what if I'm smoking hot?

subtitles.original: Minus Kiara! Hehehe!
subtitles.english: Minus Kiara! Hehehe!

subtitles.original:
If you start feeling unwell at any point,
please don't push yourself.
subtitles.english:
If you start feeling unwell at any point,
please don't push yourself.

subtitles.original:
Just reach out to the nearest staff member
for help. And hydrate!
subtitles.english:
Just reach out to the nearest staff member
for help. And hydrate!

subtitles.original:
For everyone's safety, please avoid
any dangerous or disruptive behavior.
subtitles.english:
For everyone's safety, please avoid
any dangerous or disruptive behavior.

subtitles.original: This includes moshing...
subtitles.english: This includes moshing...

subtitles.original: No moshing! I mean it!
subtitles.english: No moshing! I mean it!

subtitles.original:
Moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders,
jumping excessively, or throwing objects.
subtitles.english:
Moshing, diving, sitting on shoulders,
jumping excessively, or throwing objects.

subtitles.original:
Climbing onto the stage, blocking the aisles,
or rushing the front is also not allowed.
subtitles.english:
Climbing onto the stage, blocking the aisles,
or rushing the front is also not allowed.

subtitles.original:
Please refrain from disruptive shouting,
erratic lightstick movements...
subtitles.english:
Please refrain from disruptive shouting,
erratic lightstick movements...

subtitles.original:
...or any extreme motions that might
interfere with others. Be considerate.
subtitles.english:
...or any extreme motions that might
interfere with others. Be considerate.

subtitles.original:
If you don't follow the staff instructions,
you may be asked to leave. Nooo!
subtitles.english:
If you don't follow the staff instructions,
you may be asked to leave. Nooo!

subtitles.original:
Please keep in mind that the organizers,
performers, and staff cannot be held responsible...
subtitles.english:
Please keep in mind that the organizers,
performers, and staff cannot be held responsible...

subtitles.original:
...for any accidents, damage, or trouble
caused by failing to follow instructions.
subtitles.english:
...for any accidents, damage, or trouble
caused by failing to follow instructions.

subtitles.original:
Any cost for damages from ignoring these rules
will be the responsibility of the person involved.
subtitles.english:
Any cost for damages from ignoring these rules
will be the responsibility of the person involved.

subtitles.original: So be careful guys, okay?
subtitles.english: So be careful guys, okay?

subtitles.original:
There are cameras in the venue today,
and you might appear in footage or photos.
subtitles.english:
There are cameras in the venue today,
and you might appear in footage or photos.

subtitles.original:
These may be used for promotional purposes,
so please keep that in mind.
subtitles.english:
These may be used for promotional purposes,
so please keep that in mind.

subtitles.original: Y'all are looking cute!
subtitles.english: Y'all are looking cute!

subtitles.original:
And finally, big news!
Today's concert will be in two parts!
subtitles.english:
And finally, big news!
Today's concert will be in two parts!

subtitles.original:
There's a part for Kiara and a part for me,
so please look forward to both of them!
subtitles.english:
There's a part for Kiara and a part for me,
so please look forward to both of them!

subtitles.original: Alright, that is it for the rules!
subtitles.english: Alright, that is it for the rules!

subtitles.original: The show is about to begin, so get ready!
subtitles.english: The show is about to begin, so get ready!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye!

subtitles.original: Bye-bye! See you soon!
subtitles.english: Bye-bye! See you soon!

subtitles.original: TAKO-TORI! TAKO-TORI! TAKO-TORI!
subtitles.english: TAKO-TORI! TAKO-TORI! TAKO-TORI!
